steps.title: Identify the subject's number
steps.content: The subject is the average processing power (singular). The parenthetical phrase about microchip cores elaborates on microchips, not the subject.

steps.title: Apply the agreement rule
steps.content:
Has improved is the only singular option and uses present perfect tense to fit the since then timeframe (spanning from the early 2000s to now).

The other three choices use plural verbs, which violate subject-verb agreement with the singular subject.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
